steps.title: Use the input at the border
steps.content: The variable $x$ is hours after crossing the city border. At the moment the train crosses the city border, $x=0$.

steps.title: Evaluate the starting value
steps.content:
Substitute $x=0$ into the function:
$$
f(0)=60(0)+12=12
$$
So the train had already traveled $12$ kilometers by the time it crossed the border.

steps.title: Interpret the constant
steps.content: That distance was traveled between the station and the city border. The answer is A.
